faqs.question: How long does a typical interior renovation project take?
faqs.answer: The timeline depends on the project scope and space size. A single room interior renovation usually takes 2-4 weeks, while complete home renovation and interior projects may take 45-90 days. Commercial interior renovation projects can take 60-120 days depending on complexity. Buildcare Turkey Interior Contractor provides a detailed project timeline during the initial consultation.

faqs.question: What is the cost of interior design and renovation services?
faqs.answer: Pricing depends on the project size, materials, customization, and renovation requirements. Residential interior and renovation projects generally start from ₹8 lakhs for a 2BHK apartment. Buildcare Turkey Interior Contractor offers customized packages suitable for different budgets while maintaining premium quality standards.

faqs.question: Do you provide a free consultation?
faqs.answer: Yes! Buildcare Turkey Interior Contractor offers a free consultation where our interior experts understand your space, renovation requirements, design preferences, and budget. We also provide initial ideas and a rough project estimate during the discussion.

faqs.question: What materials do you use for interiors and modular kitchens?
faqs.answer: We use premium-quality materials including marine plywood (BWR grade), HDHMR boards, laminates, acrylic finishes, veneers, quartz countertops, granite, and branded hardware from Hettich, Hafele, and Blum. Our focus is on durability, aesthetics, and long-lasting performance for all interior and renovation services.

faqs.question: Do you handle complete renovation and interior projects?
faqs.answer: Yes, Buildcare Turkey Interior Contractor provides complete end-to-end interior and renovation services including design planning, civil work, carpentry, false ceiling, flooring, painting, electrical, plumbing, modular kitchens, furniture, lighting, and final styling. We manage the entire process from concept to handover.

faqs.question: What warranty do you provide on your work?
faqs.answer: We provide warranties on modular furniture, hardware, and interior workmanship. Structural modular furniture includes up to 10 years warranty, hardware up to 5 years, and painting services include limited workmanship warranty. Buildcare Turkey Interior Contractor also provides after-project support and maintenance guidance.

faqs.question: Can I see your previous interior and renovation projects?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! You can explore our completed residential and commercial interior renovation projects through our portfolio, showroom presentations, and 3D visualizations. Buildcare Turkey Interior Contractor also provides design previews before project execution begins.

faqs.question: Do you work on projects outside your city?
faqs.answer: Yes, Buildcare Turkey Interior Contractor handles residential and commercial interior renovation projects across multiple cities. Our team coordinates project execution efficiently with experienced professionals and trusted vendor networks.

faqs.question: How do you handle project payments?
faqs.answer: We follow a milestone-based payment process for transparency and smooth project execution. Payments are divided into stages including advance booking, mid-project progress, material installation, and final handover. Proper invoices and documentation are provided for every transaction.

faqs.question: Can changes be made during the renovation project?
faqs.answer: Yes, minor modifications can usually be accommodated during the project. For major design or renovation changes, Buildcare Turkey Interior Contractor provides updated timelines and revised quotations. We recommend finalizing layouts and designs during the planning stage to ensure faster and smoother execution.
